cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 4.1.1)
set(CMAKE_MODULE_PATH "/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/platforms/ios/cmake/Modules;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/platforms/ios/cmake/Modules")
set(_CMAKE_CHECK_ENABLED_LANGUAGES "C;CXX")
set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER "/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/clang")
set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER_ID "AppleClang")
set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER_LOADED 1)
set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER_VERSION "17.0.0.17000603")
set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER "/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/clang++")
set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID "AppleClang")
set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_LOADED 1)
set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_VERSION "17.0.0.17000603")

project(CheckASM_NASM LANGUAGES ASM_NASM)
file(WRITE "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/result.cmake" "set(CMAKE_ASM_NASM_COMPILER \"${CMAKE_ASM_NASM_COMPILER}\")
")
